verificationNotes: Confirm the installed entry resolves to the authored source path.
Do not keep local-only edits in the installed copy.
Confirm sourcePath and skillId match the registry entry.
Re-sync from repo source if drift is detected.
Confirm installed copy remains a disposable operational mirror.
Verify frontmatter and body identity against repo source after install.

verificationChecks: Resolve each install entry through registry before install.
Verify installed copies against authored source after install.
Treat any installed drift as a re-sync issue, not as a new edit surface.
notes: This plan covers authored first-party skills only.
The plan expresses intended install operationalization and does not store runtime machine state.
